name: China Quanjude(Group) Co.,Ltd
summary: China Quanjude (Group) Co., Ltd. operates Chinese restaurants under the Quanjude and Mingzhu brand name in China. The company produces and sells roast duck and various cooked food products; lotus leaf cakes, sweet noodles, and other roast duck accessories; and mooncakes, dumplings, and Yuanxiao products under the Quanjude and Fangshan brand name. It also offers pasta and the courtesan brand palace cakes; and chili sauce under the Sichuan hotel brand. In addition, the company provides Fortress Garden pasta food products. Further, it offers Chinese food catering services. China Quanjude (Group) Co., Ltd. was founded in 1864 and is based in Beijing, China.
